transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yeah hi, I've been waiting on a card for like nearly two weeks now and I'm getting pretty fed up.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I don't have it in front of me. Can't you look me up by name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I need the account number to access anything.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right. The card system shows it sent. I can't tell you more than that.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: When was it sent? And where was it sent to?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It just says dispatched. These things get delayed all the time, not our problem.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Not your problem? I can't use my account without a card.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You can use the app. The card will come when it comes.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Can you reissue it at least?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Not until it's officially lost, which is after 30 days. Those are the rules. Sorry I can't help more.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity — accessed account on account number alone without further verification
provided incorrect reissue policy (stated 30-day wait, no such policy exists)
did not confirm dispatch address or offer any remedial action
